title: Every checklist-* criterion in this Core Features dimension passes during the agent verifier run
No console.error or unhandled promise rejections appear in the browser log during the agent verifier session
Scenes collection supports create, edit, and delete with list rows and derived counts updating from shared application state
At least two distinct views or interaction modes are switchable without full page navigation
Domain state beyond CRUD is implemented (filters, status/priority/mode, or equivalent) and recomputes visible results from the shared collection
Renders visible validation feedback when create is submitted with empty required fields, and the collection count does not increase
Scenes list is static HTML only with no working create/edit/delete against shared state
App chrome navigates via real outbound links to other origins instead of in-app view state
Jotai holds scenes, view mode, slide index, and edit focus — shared across components
Implemented with React, Jotai, and Tailwind CSS; no browser storage APIs for persistence
Uses localStorage or sessionStorage to persist scenes or view mode
Manages the scenes collection only in component-local useState rather than Jotai
Storyboard workspace with Tile/List/Slide density remains a docs tool, not a marketing landing
Empty board state is visually present when no scenes remain
Shows only a static tutorial poster with no editable scene collection
Required hover animations are present; scene enter and mode switches animate as specified
Board/Slide mode switches update without full reload and keep hover feedback
Omits hover lifts on scene cards or toggles so the board feels static on pointer hover
